verses.2: “Do you think this to be your right,
verses.3: that you ask, ‘What advantage will it be to you?
verses.5: Look to the skies, and see.
verses.6: If you have sinned, what effect do you have against him?
verses.7: If you are righteous, what do you give him?
verses.8: Your wickedness may hurt a man as you are,
verses.9: “By reason of the multitude of oppressions they cry out.
verses.10: But no one says, ‘Where is God my Maker,
verses.11: who teaches us more than the animals of the earth,
verses.12: There they cry, but no one answers,
verses.13: Surely God will not hear an empty cry,
verses.14: How much less when you say you don’t see him.
verses.15: But now, because he has not visited in his anger,
verses.16: therefore Job opens his mouth with empty talk,
